title: Trump loses appeals court bid to delay paying E. Jean Carroll $5M in damages
summary: Trump's appeal to delay paying $5 million in damages to E. Jean Carroll was rejected by an appeals court. He was held civilly liable in two trials for defaming her when he denied her claims of sexual abuse. This represents a legal defeat in the ongoing defamation case.
content: Trump was held civilly liable in two trials for defaming E. Jean Carroll when he denied her claim he sexually abused her in a New York department store.

zh.title: 特朗普败诉上诉以延迟支付给E·让·卡罗尔的500万美元赔偿金
zh.summary: 特朗普延迟支付给E·让·卡罗尔500万美元赔偿金的上诉被法院驳回。在两起诉讼中，他因否认她的性虐待指控而被判民事诽谤责任。这代表了这起持续进行的诽谤案件中的法律败诉。

title: Oil extends gains as Iran-U.S. tensions raise concerns over supply disruptions
summary: Oil prices rose Thursday amid concerns about potential supply disruptions in the Middle East following fresh U.S. military strikes on Iran. The escalation of tensions between Washington and Tehran is driving investor worry about global oil availability. Rising geopolitical risks are supporting crude prices.
content: Oil rises Thursday, amid worries over supply disruptions in the Middle East following fresh strikes on Iran by the U.S. military.

zh.title: 随着伊朗-美国紧张局势引发供应中断担忧，油价继续上涨
zh.summary: 周四油价上升，原因是美国对伊朗进行新的军事打击后中东潜在供应中断的担忧。华盛顿和德黑兰之间紧张局势的升级正在推动投资者对全球石油供应的担忧。地缘政治风险上升正在支撑原油价格。

title: China consumer price growth weakens in June while producer inflation rises to near 4-year high
summary: China's consumer price growth slowed in June while producer inflation climbed to a near four-year high, widening the gap between the two measures. The divergence reflects an economy with robust exports but weak domestic demand, a pattern becoming a structural feature of China's economy. Investors are increasingly viewing this two-speed growth as a defining long-term characteristic.
content: Investors increasingly view China's two-speed growth with robust export and tepid domestic demand as a defining long-term feature of the Chinese economy.

zh.title: 中国6月消费物价增长放缓，生产者通胀升至近四年高点
zh.summary: 中国6月消费物价增长放缓，而生产者通胀升至近四年高点，扩大了两者之间的差距。这种分化反映了一个出口强劲但国内需求疲弱的经济体，这种模式正成为中国经济的结构性特征。投资者越来越多地将这种两速增长视为一个长期特征。

title: AirPods maker Luxshare slides over 5% in Hong Kong debut
summary: Luxshare, the manufacturer of AirPods, declined over 5 percent during its Hong Kong stock market debut despite raising HK$24.27 billion ($3.09 billion). The company, already listed in Shenzhen, priced shares at 63.28 Hong Kong dollars each. The opening day decline signals investor caution despite the substantial capital raise.
content: The company, which is already listed in Shenzhen, had priced shares in the IPO at 63.28 Hong Kong dollars apiece, raising HK$24.27 billion ($3.09 billion).

zh.title: AirPods代工厂Luxshare香港上市首日下跌逾5%
zh.summary: 作为AirPods制造商的Luxshare尽管融资242.7亿港元（30.9亿美元），但在香港股市上市首日跌幅超过5%。这家已在深圳上市的公司股价定在每股63.28港元。首日下跌反映出投资者谨慎态度，尽管融资规模庞大。

title: Platner quits Maine Senate race; Democrats set to pick new nominee
summary: Maine Democratic Senate candidate Platner has withdrawn from the race, forcing Democrats to quickly nominate a replacement. The timing creates pressure with less than four months remaining until midterm elections. The sudden vacancy leaves Democrats scrambling to identify and vet a new candidate.
content: Maine Democrats must now replace Platner with less than four months until the midterm elections.

zh.title: Platner退出缅因州参议院竞选；民主党准备提名新候选人
zh.summary: 缅因州民主党参议院候选人Platner已退出竞选，迫使民主党迅速提名替代者。距离中期选举不到四个月的时间使局势紧急。突然出现的空缺促使民主党仓促地寻找和审查新候选人。

title: Levi’s is finding new ways to win customers — by looking toward tops and ‘denim luxury’
summary: Levi's raised its full-year earnings outlook for the second consecutive time, signaling strong business momentum and consumer demand. The iconic jeans maker is diversifying into new categories including tops and premium positioning labeled as 'denim luxury.' Despite the positive guidance, shares fell in after-hours trading.
content: Jeans maker raises its full-year outlook for the second straight time, but shares fall after hours

zh.title: Levi's找到赢得客户的新方式——拓展上装和"牛仔奢侈品"
zh.summary: Levi's连续第二次上调全年收益预期，显示强劲的业务势头和消费者需求。这家标志性牛仔裤制造商正在拓展新品类，包括上装和被称为"牛仔奢侈品"的高端定位。尽管前景向好，但该公司股价在盘后交易中下跌。

title: World Cup drives Google Search to record queries per second
summary: Google Search reached a record number of queries per second, driven by unprecedented interest in the World Cup. The surge was fueled by global interest in Lionel Messi and Argentina's World Cup campaign. This milestone represents a significant traffic achievement for the search giant.
content: The milestone comes amid Lionel Messi and Argentina's popularity.

zh.title: 世界杯推动谷歌搜索创造每秒查询量纪录
zh.summary: 谷歌搜索达到了创纪录的每秒查询量,受到了对世界杯前所未有的关注驱动。这次激增由全球对梅西和阿根廷世界杯征程的兴趣推动。这一里程碑代表了搜索巨头的重大流量成就。

title: Higher gas prices aren’t the only way rising tensions with Iran will hit home
summary: Wall Street analysts expect Trump's declaration that the Iran cease-fire is over will hurt airlines and home builders more than it benefits oil companies. The economic impact of escalating Middle East tensions extends well beyond higher gas prices. Multiple sectors face pressure from geopolitical uncertainty.
content: Wall Street expects President Donald Trump’s call that the Iran cease-fire is over will hurt airlines and home builders more than it will help oil companies.

zh.title: 伊朗紧张局势升级对家庭的影响不仅仅是汽油价格上升
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师预计,特朗普宣布伊朗停火结束将对航空公司和房屋建筑商造成的伤害比对石油公司的益处更大。中东紧张局势升级的经济影响远远超出了更高的汽油价格。多个行业面临地缘政治不确定性的压力。
